dialogues.text: (Entering the second month... that was quick)
(Nana-chan has become a regular client, coming almost daily)
(Lately her treatment requests have become more specific, really testing my professionalism)
(I need to make sure I don't forget about the debt repayment)
(Maybe I should try buying some new treatment tools at the shop)
(Getting a part-time job to increase funds is another option)
